brand.name: WIZL
brand.slogan: Scan it. Know it. Track it.
brand.description: Discover what you got. Scan, track, and explore cannabis strains with AI.

age.question: Are you 20 or older?
age.note:
You must be of legal age to use WIZL.
Cannabis laws vary by location — know your local rules.
age.denied: Not yet, friend. Come back when you're older.
age.deniedNote: WIZL is only available for users 20+ years old.
age.legal: By entering you confirm you are of legal age in your jurisdiction. WIZL is an educational cannabis discovery tool.

home.aiScannerDesc: Snap a photo of the jar — get a beautiful strain card with effects, flavors, and community rating. Like magic.
home.proDesc: Unlimited scans, AI chat, full history, Club badge.
home.trialNote: Pay what you want. Even rolling papers cost more.

strains.title: Strain Guide
strains.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

checkin.title: What you got?

checkin.scanDesc: Photo the jar — we'll do the rest
checkin.notePlaceholder: Flavor, effect, vibe — whatever you feel...
checkin.tapToScan: Tap to scan with AI Vision
checkin.aiRecognize: WIZL will recognize the strain from the photo
checkin.firstScanDesc: You made your first check-in on WIZL!

pro.title: WIZL Club
pro.subtitle: Your entry ticket. One price. Forever member.
pro.aiScannerDesc: Snap a photo — get full strain info instantly
pro.unlimitedScansDesc: No daily limits. Scan everything you find
pro.smartInsightsDesc: Unlimited AI chat — ask anything about strains
pro.fullHistoryDesc: Track every strain you've ever tried
pro.exclusiveBadgesDesc: Exclusive badge + your name in credits forever
pro.globalMapDesc: See your check-ins across the world
pro.supportDesc: WIZL is built by one dude walking through Bangkok with a GoPro and a dream. Your $4.20 directly supports this adventure and keeps the app free for everyone. Forever.
pro.trialNote: From $4.20/year — pay what you want. Even rolling papers cost more.
pro.noTricks: You know the vibe. No tricks. Just vibes.
pro.youreIn: You're in. All features unlocked. Go explore.
